title: Move tool_guidance endpoints from templates into connector capabilities
description: Template JSONs embed provider-specific API endpoints (Google Ads GAQL paths, GA4 runReport URLs, Meta v19.0 paths) inside freeform tool_guidance strings. The connector catalog is the natural home for this knowledge. Refactor so connectors expose typed capabilities (e.g. ad_platform.pull_campaign_performance(range)) and templates compose capabilities by name. The persona LLM receives resolved endpoint docs at runtime from the connector, not from frozen template text.
reasoning: When Meta bumps to v20 or Google Ads deprecates a GAQL field, the current design requires editing 107 template files plus all their language overlays. Capability-level indirection means one connector update fixes every template that uses it. It also lets users author their own connectors once and have them usable by the entire catalog.
